rules.ruleDescription:
[F]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Context action: qspace

[H]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Call 'Here2There (active to target)'

[O]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Capture text (no line breaks) using CSX

[S]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Capture area using CSX

[⇧]+[S]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Capture window using CSX

[X]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Context action: copy

[Y]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Context action: copy

[Z]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Call 'zoxide search directories'

[F1]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit 'DISPLAY BRIGHTNESS DECREMENT'

[F2]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit 'DISPLAY BRIGHTNESS INCREMENT'

[F8]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit 'PLAY OR PAUSE'

[vmCOCS]+[T]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Run '/Users/jason/.venv/typinator/bin/python /Users/jason/Scripts/apps/Typinator/new_rule/new_rule.py'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Run osascript '/Users/jason/Scripts/apps/Typinator/Edit_Last_Typinator_Expansion-original.scpt'

[vmCOCS]+[_]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Run '/opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local screenFrame = screen:frame(); local winFrame = win and win:frame() or screenFrame; local positionTolerance = 24; local widthCoverage = screenFrame.w > 0 and (winFrame.w / screenFrame.w) or 0; local heightCoverage = screenFrame.h > 0 and (winFrame.h / screenFrame.h) or 0; local leftAligned = math.abs(winFrame.x - screenFrame.x) <= positionTolerance; local topAligned = math.abs(winFrame.y - screenFrame.y) <= positionTolerance; local isMaximized = leftAligned and topAligned and widthCoverage >= 0.97 and heightCoverage >= 0.9; local url = isMaximized and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=restore]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=maximize]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)''

to_if_alone.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local screenFrame = screen:frame(); local winFrame = win and win:frame() or screenFrame; local positionTolerance = 24; local widthCoverage = screenFrame.w > 0 and (winFrame.w / screenFrame.w) or 0; local heightCoverage = screenFrame.h > 0 and (winFrame.h / screenFrame.h) or 0; local leftAligned = math.abs(winFrame.x - screenFrame.x) <= positionTolerance; local topAligned = math.abs(winFrame.y - screenFrame.y) <= positionTolerance; local isMaximized = leftAligned and topAligned and widthCoverage >= 0.97 and heightCoverage >= 0.9; local url = isMaximized and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=restore]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=maximize]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

to_if_canceled.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local screenFrame = screen:frame(); local winFrame = win and win:frame() or screenFrame; local positionTolerance = 24; local widthCoverage = screenFrame.w > 0 and (winFrame.w / screenFrame.w) or 0; local heightCoverage = screenFrame.h > 0 and (winFrame.h / screenFrame.h) or 0; local leftAligned = math.abs(winFrame.x - screenFrame.x) <= positionTolerance; local topAligned = math.abs(winFrame.y - screenFrame.y) <= positionTolerance; local isMaximized = leftAligned and topAligned and widthCoverage >= 0.97 and heightCoverage >= 0.9; local url = isMaximized and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=restore]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=maximize]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

rules.ruleDescription:
[vmCOCS]+[⇥]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Open 'rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=next-display'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Open 'rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=previous-display'

[vmCOCS]+[←]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Run '/opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=left-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=top-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)''
	On Hold:
		Always:	Open 'rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=previous-display'

to_if_alone.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=left-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=top-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

to_if_canceled.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=left-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=top-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

rules.ruleDescription:
[vmCOCS]+[→]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Run '/opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=right-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=bottom-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)''
	On Hold:
		Always:	Open 'rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=next-display'

to_if_alone.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=right-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=bottom-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

to_if_canceled.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/hs -c 'local win = hs.window.focusedWindow(); local screen = (win and win:screen()) or hs.screen.mainScreen(); local frame = screen:frame(); local url = (frame.w >= frame.h) and [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=right-half]] or [[rectangle-pro://execute-action?name=bottom-half]]; hs.urlevent.openURL(url)'

rules.ruleDescription:
[→⌥]+[K]:
---
	On Hold:
		Always:	Context action: kitty

[→⌥]+[S]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Run 'if pgrep -x 'Spotify' > /dev/null; then open 'raycast-x://extensions/mattisssa/spotify-player/togglePlayPause'; else /Users/jason/.local/bin/open-app -b 'com.spotify.client'; fi; echo 'Spotify toggled''
	On Hold:
		Always:	Call 'Spotify search'

to_if_alone.shell_command: if pgrep -x 'Spotify' > /dev/null; then open 'raycast-x://extensions/mattisssa/spotify-player/togglePlayPause'; else /Users/jason/.local/bin/open-app -b 'com.spotify.client'; fi; echo 'Spotify toggled'

to_if_canceled.shell_command: if pgrep -x 'Spotify' > /dev/null; then open 'raycast-x://extensions/mattisssa/spotify-player/togglePlayPause'; else /Users/jason/.local/bin/open-app -b 'com.spotify.client'; fi; echo 'Spotify toggled'

rules.ruleDescription:
[⌘]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Emit '⌘'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit '⌘'
	On Double Tap:
		Always:	Go back 1 apps

[␛]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Emit '␛'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Run '/Users/jason/.local/bin/kill-app --foreground'
	On Double Tap Hold:
		Always:	Run '/Users/jason/.local/bin/kill-app'

[←⌃]+[␛]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	open Activity Monitor
	On Hold:
		Always:	open Process Spy

rules.ruleDescription: [⇪]        →    VM launcher / vmCOC_ / vmCOCS / vmCO_S (on hold)

[←⌘←⌥←⌃←⇧]+[,]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	open System Settings

[←⌘←⌥←⌃←⇧]+[␛]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	open Activity Monitor

to_if_held_down.shell_command: /Users/jason/.local/bin/uv --directory /Users/jason/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py quick_date --source clipboard --dest paste
/Users/jason/.local/bin/uv --directory /Users/jason/Scripts/strings/text_processor run python interfaces/cli.py quick_date --source clipboard --dest paste

rules.ruleDescription:
[←⌘]+[/]:
---
	On Tap:
		In Microsoft Word:	Run osascript '/Users/jason/Scripts/apps/karabiner/karabiner.ts/scripts/applescripts/get-word-document-path.applescript' then Run '/Applications/Privileges.app/Contents/MacOS/PrivilegesCLI -a && sleep 1'

[←⌘]+[/]:
---
	On Tap:
		In Security Agent/System Settings/Privacy & Security extension/PIN entry and Focused UI role and Focused UI subrole:	Run command 'Fill password'
		In Security Agent/System Settings/Privacy & Security extension/PIN entry and Focused UI role and not Focused UI subrole:	Run command 'Fill username and password'

manipulatorSources.description: In Security Agent/System Settings/Privacy & Security extension/PIN entry and Focused UI role and Focused UI subrole
In Security Agent/System Settings/Privacy & Security extension/PIN entry and Focused UI role and not Focused UI subrole

rules.ruleDescription:
[←⌘←⇧]+[→]:
---
	On Tap:
		In Zen browser:	Emit ']'+←⌘←⇧

[←⌘←⇧]+[←]:
---
	On Tap:
		In Zen browser:	Emit '['+←⌘←⇧

[⇧]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Emit '⇧'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit '⇧'
	On Double Tap:
		Always:	Run 'open -u raycast-x://extensions/raycast/clipboard-history/clipboard-history'

[⇧]:
---
	On Tap:
		Always:	Emit '⇧'
	On Hold:
		Always:	Emit '⇧'
	On Double Tap:
		Always:	Run 'open -u raycast-x://extensions/raycast/clipboard-history/clipboard-history'
